mapper.insert: INSERT INTO scene_sets (id, name, description, item_ids_json, active, tags_json, environments_json, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{description}, #{itemIds, typeHandler=com.baafoo.server.storage.mybatis.JsonTypeHandler}, #{active}, #{tags, typeHandler=com.baafoo.server.storage.mybatis.JsonTypeHandler}, #{environments, typeHandler=com.baafoo.server.storage.mybatis.JsonTypeHandler}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE scene_sets SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, item_ids_json = #{itemIds, typeHandler=com.baafoo.server.storage.mybatis.JsonTypeHandler}, active = #{active}, tags_json = #{tags, typeHandler=com.baafoo.server.storage.mybatis.JsonTypeHandler}, environments_json = #{environments, typeHandler=com.baafoo.server.storage.mybatis.JsonTypeHandler}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
